'''Alfi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], whilst still a new Jedi Knight, Alfi was among those [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] at the [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Ossus Academy]] when the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] attempted to "secure" it, holding the students hostage. Alfi was in a cell when GAG [[Major/Legends|major]] [[Salle Serpa]] moved against the Jedi, and was [[Death/Legends|killed]] there by GAG forces.

{{Char-stub}}
